reasoning: Drake is consistently one of the most streamed artists on Spotify, typically ranking in the top 5 globally. However, he has not claimed the #1 overall spot since 2018. The top spot in recent years has been dominated by Taylor Swift and Bad Bunny, both of whom have significantly greater total daily baseline streams and stronger global momentum over the last few years. Drake also recently went through a highly publicized beef with Kendrick Lamar in 2024, which may have arguably slowed his universal appeal slightly, while competitors like The Weeknd and Taylor Swift continue to dominate global markets. Given the required catalogue strength and global reach needed to be the #1 most streamed artist for an entire year against such fierce competition, the probability of Drake topping the list in 2025 is very low.
